items.title_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman to meet with lawmakers, Trump officials in D.C.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 将在华盛顿会见立法者和特朗普官员
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump signed an executive order about AI this week, which Altman voiced support for.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周签署了一项有关人工智能的行政命令，奥特曼对此表示支持。

items.title_en: SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 的 IPO 路演价格固定为 135 美元，估值为 1.75 万亿美元
items.desc_en: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh- biggest in the U.S. and above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.
items.desc_zh: 这一估值将使埃隆·马斯克的公司成为美国第七大公司，超过市值约为 1.6 万亿美元的特斯拉。

items.title_en: There's a great buying opportunity for this struggling bank stock, says Bank of America
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，这只陷入困境的银行股有很大的买入机会

items.desc_zh: 据美国银行称，富国银行股票的交易价格低于同业。

items.desc_zh: 兰迪·芬斯特拉的失败可能被证明是总统政治本能丧失的一个例子。

items.title_en: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
items.title_zh: 共和党参议员蒂利斯猛烈抨击特朗普情报人选普尔特：“别以为他有祈祷”
items.desc_en: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.
items.desc_zh: 普尔特被广泛视为特朗普的忠实拥护者，他在领导住房监管机构期间一直针对总统的政治敌人。

items.title_en: Bitcoin trails stocks by most since 2019 as traders get their kicks elsewhere
items.title_zh: 比特币自 2019 年以来落后股市的幅度最大，因为交易者在其他地方感兴趣
items.desc_en: Bitcoin hasn't had this cold a winter in seven years.
items.desc_zh: 比特币已经七年没有经历过这么冷的冬天了。

items.desc_en: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title_zh: ADP 报告称，5 月份私营部门就业人数增长 122,000 人，强于预期
items.desc_en: Unlike prior months, where job growth was concentrated in healthcare and a few other sectors, gains were more broad-based.
items.desc_zh: 与前几个月不同的是，前几个月就业增长主要集中在医疗保健和其他一些行业，而这次增长的基础更为广泛。

items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断

items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时

items.title_zh: 德里火灾至少21人死亡，其中包括外国人
items.desc_en: Many victims were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives.
items.desc_zh: 许多受害者是前往印度接受治疗或陪伴亲戚的南亚人。

items.desc_zh: 此前，美国最高法院在二月份撤销了美国总统唐纳德·特朗普的多项先前职责。

items.title_en: Josh Turek wins Iowa Democratic Senate primary that could shape Democrats' path to Senate majority
items.title_zh: 乔什·图雷克 (Josh Turek) 赢得爱荷华州民主党参议院初选，这可能会影响民主党获得参议院多数席位的道路
items.desc_en: Iowa's Senate primary between state Rep. Josh Turek and state Sen. Zach Wahls could be critical as Democrats look to take back power in Congress.
items.desc_zh: 爱荷华州众议员乔什·图雷克 (Josh Turek) 和州参议员扎克·瓦尔斯 (Zach Wahls) 之间的参议院初选可能至关重要，因为民主党希望夺回国会权力。

items.title_en: Hilton, Becerra lead primary race for California governor; Bass ahead in LA mayoral race
items.title_zh: 希尔顿、贝塞拉在加州州长初选中领先；巴斯在洛杉矶市长竞选中领先
items.desc_en: Republican television commentator Steve Hilton and Democratic former cabinet secretary Xavier Becerra took the early lead in the open primary race for governor.
items.desc_zh: 共和党电视评论员史蒂夫·希尔顿和民主党前内阁秘书泽维尔·贝塞拉在州长公开初选中率先领先。

items.title_en: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass advances to run-off in race to run California's biggest city
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶市长凯伦·巴斯 (Karen Bass) 在加州最大城市的竞选中晋级决选
items.desc_en: The mayor's opponent could be either Republican newcomer and reality TV star Spencer Pratt, or a fellow Democrat, council member Nithya Raman.
items.desc_zh: 市长的对手可能是共和党新人、电视真人秀明星斯宾塞·普拉特(Spencer Pratt)，也可能是民主党同僚、市议员尼西亚·拉曼(Nithya Raman)。

items.title_en: Celine Dion 'heartbroken' by death of Beauty and the Beast singer Peabo Bryson
items.title_zh: 席琳·迪翁因《美女与野兽》歌手皮博·布莱森的去世而“心碎”
items.desc_en: Bryson was best known as the voice behind Disney songs like A Whole New World and Beauty and the Beast.
items.desc_zh: 布莱森最出名的是为《全新世界》和《美女与野兽》等迪士尼歌曲配音。

items.title_en: Seven killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
items.title_zh: 无人机在俄罗斯控制的乌克兰地区撞上公共汽车，造成七人死亡
items.desc_en: The bus was travelling between Moscow and Simferopol, in Russian-occupied Crimea, an official says.
items.desc_zh: 一名官员称，这辆巴士当时正在莫斯科和俄罗斯占领的克里米亚的辛菲罗波尔之间行驶。

items.title_en: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.title_zh: 英国的出版商可以选择退出 Google AI 搜索结果
items.desc_en: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.desc_zh: 竞争与市场管理局表示，这将使出版商“在与谷歌谈判内容交易时处于更有利的地位”。

items.title_en: Shell pumped oil through Nigeria pipeline for years despite pollution evidence, documents show
items.title_zh: 文件显示，尽管有污染证据，壳牌多年来仍通过尼日利亚管道泵送石油
items.desc_en: The oil giant says the documents ignore the critical context of the complex operating environment at the time.
items.desc_zh: 这家石油巨头表示，这些文件忽略了当时复杂运营环境的关键背景。

items.title_en: Indonesia's Prabowo fires head of free meals scheme plagued by poisonings
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚普拉博沃解雇因中毒事件困扰的免费餐计划负责人
items.desc_en: The centrepiece programme of Prabowo's government has left tens of thousands of school children ill.
items.desc_zh: 普拉博沃政府的核心计划已导致数万名学童患病。

items.title_en: Watch: Man attacked by bear at steel works in Japan
items.title_zh: 观看：日本钢铁厂男子遭熊袭击
items.desc_en: The bear, which injured four people in the attack on Tuesday, remains on the loose within the factory compound.
items.desc_zh: 这只熊在周二的袭击中造成四人受伤，目前仍在工厂内逍遥法外。

items.title_en: Composer
items.title_zh: Composer
items.desc_en: Multiplayer markdown for you, your team, and your agents.
items.desc_zh: 为您、您的团队和您的经纪人提供多人游戏降价。

items.title_en: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
items.title_zh: 您是否发现自己漫无目的地滚动？你并不孤单
items.desc_en: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.
items.desc_zh: Virgin Media O2 的一份报告显示，平均 36% 的人花在手机上的时间没有明确的目的。

items.title_en: New York police investigate videos of men emerging from city's sewer system
items.title_zh: 纽约警方调查男子从城市下水道系统中出来的视频
items.desc_en: Authorities warn that entering the sewer system is both illegal and extremely dangerous.
items.desc_zh: 当局警告说，进入下水道系统既非法又极其危险。

items.title_en: US says it fired missile at Iran-bound oil tanker
items.title_zh: 美国称向前往伊朗的油轮发射导弹
items.desc_en: The US military says the vessel's engine room was hit after the crew "ignored repeated warnings".
items.desc_zh: 美国军方表示，在船员“无视反复警告”后，该船的机舱遭到袭击。

items.title_en: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers
items.title_zh: 微软测试针对上班族的可穿戴人工智能设备
items.desc_en: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，其员工正在测试“可穿戴访问徽章”和桌面设备。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.title_en: Mayor cancels DR Congo friendly with Chile in Spain over Ebola concern
items.title_zh: 因埃博拉疫情，市长取消了刚果民主共和国与智利在西班牙的友谊赛
items.desc_en: DR Congo's international friendly against Chile in Spain next week is cancelled after authorities raise health concerns over the Ebola outbreak in the African nation.
items.desc_zh: 在当局对非洲国家埃博拉疫情提出健康担忧后，刚果民主共和国下周在西班牙对阵智利的国际友谊赛被取消。

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_en: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部，但与真主党的部分休战似乎仍然有效
items.desc_en: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.
items.desc_zh: 以色列继续在南部发动攻势，但在美国宣布达成协议后并未袭击贝鲁特。

items.title_en: A bear injures 4 people in a residential area of Japan as attacks rise - Boston.com
items.title_zh: 日本一住宅区熊袭击事件加剧，造成 4 人受伤 - Boston.com
items.desc_en: A bear injures 4 people in a residential area of Japan as attacks rise  Boston.comVIDEO: 4 injured, including elderly woman, after black bear enters steel factory grounds  KOMOA bear injures 4 people
items.desc_zh: 随着袭击事件增多，日本住宅区一只熊造成 4 人受伤 Boston.com 视频：黑熊进入钢铁厂场地后，4 人受伤，其中包括老年妇女 KOMOA 熊造成 4 人受伤

items.title_en: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
items.title_zh: 家人称英国夫妇伊朗判刑上诉败诉
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户

items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_en: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价
items.desc_en: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。
